SELECT toUInt32(val) AS converted_val FROM test_table WHERE toUInt32(val) > 0;
SELECT toUInt32(num) FROM another_table WHERE num > 0;
SELECT toUInt32((SELECT AVG(num) FROM another_table WHERE num > 10)) AS avg_val;
SELECT x, toUInt32(x) FROM (SELECT val FROM test_table) AS sub_query WHERE toUInt32(val) < 3000000000;
SELECT toUInt32(val) AS uint_val FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table UNION ALL SELECT '9999999999' AS val) AS union_table;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id UInt32, val String);
SELECT j.id, toUInt32(j.val) FROM test_join AS j JOIN test_table AS t ON toUInt32(t.val) > j.id;
SELECT toUInt32(val) AS uint_val, COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY toUInt32(val);
SELECT toUInt32(ROUND(val)) FROM (SELECT 32.9999 AS val UNION ALL SELECT 32.0001 AS val) AS rounded_vals;
